summary: The user is planning a future trip to Hawaii and seeks recommendations for kid-friendly activities, snorkeling spots, local markets, cuisine, and cooking classes on the islands of Oahu, Maui, and Kauai. They shared their recent 10-day trip to these islands with their children, aged 7 and 9, highlighting their experiences with local dishes and a family cooking class.
facts: The user has children aged 7 and 9. The user spent 10 days exploring the islands of Oahu, Maui, and Kauai last month. The user and their family took a cooking class on Maui where they learned to make traditional Hawaiian dishes like kalua pig and haupia. The user’s children enjoyed making kalua pig and were fascinated by the traditional cooking methods. The user’s children loved trying new foods like poke, laulau, and shave ice during their trip. The user expressed that the cooking class helped their children develop an appreciation for local culture and cuisine. The user mentioned that their kids enjoyed the hands-on experience of preparing dishes in the cooking class. The user’s children were proud to present their finished dishes to the rest of the class.
